title: gladiolus stenolobus
intro: Gladiolus stenolobus, also known as the desert candle or flame lily, is a type of flowering plant native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the roots of Gladiolus stenolobus are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
